requirement_topic.en: General Textile Flammability — Canada Consumer Product Safety Act / SOR/2016-194
requirement_topic.zh: 一般纺织品易燃性——《加拿大消费品安全法》/ SOR/2016-194
requirement_topic.zht: 一般紡織品易燃性——《加拿大消費品安全法》/ SOR/2016-194

summary.en: The Canada Consumer Product Safety Act is the binding consumer product safety law, and the Textile Flammability Regulations, SOR/2016-194, set mandatory flammability specifications for textile products. Covered products must not present prohibited rapid-flame-spread hazards under the prescribed test method and specifications. The rules apply separately from textile fibre labelling and can affect apparel fabrics, costumes, bedding, household textiles, and other textile consumer products unless a product-specific regulation applies. Compliance evidence should be based on the Canadian regulation and its incorporated test approach, not merely on a supplier declaration.
summary.zh: 《加拿大消费品安全法》是具有约束力的消费品安全法律，《纺织品易燃性条例》SOR/2016-194对纺织产品设定强制易燃性规格。覆盖产品不得在规定测试方法和规格下表现出被禁止的快速火焰蔓延风险。该规则独立于纺织品纤维标签，可能适用于服装面料、化装服、床上用品、家用纺织品及其他纺织消费品，除非适用具体产品条例。合规证据应基于加拿大条例及其纳入的测试方法，而非仅依赖供应商声明。
summary.zht: 《加拿大消費品安全法》是具有約束力的消費品安全法律，《紡織品易燃性條例》SOR/2016-194對紡織產品設定強制易燃性規格。覆蓋產品不得在規定測試方法和規格下表現出被禁止的快速火焰蔓延風險。該規則獨立於紡織品纖維標籤，可能適用於服裝面料、化裝服、床上用品、家用紡織品及其他紡織消費品，除非適用具體產品條例。合規證據應基於加拿大條例及其納入的測試方法，而非僅依賴供應商聲明。

standards_or_laws: Canada Consumer Product Safety Act, S.C. 2010, c. 21

summary.en: China's domestic textile safety framework focuses on GB 18401-2010 for basic chemical and physical safety and GB 31701-2015 for infant and children's textile products. Product-specific Chinese standards may address flame resistance for certain categories, but general apparel complying with GB 18401 is not automatically tested to Canada's textile flammability regulation. Chinese supplier inspection reports may use different conditioning, specimen preparation, fabric-surface, or burn-rate criteria.
summary.zh: 中国国内纺织品安全框架主要以GB 18401-2010规范基本化学和物理安全，并以GB 31701-2015规范婴幼儿及儿童纺织产品。部分具体产品中国标准可能涉及阻燃性能，但符合GB 18401的一般服装并不会自动按加拿大纺织品易燃性条例测试。中国供应商检测报告可能采用不同的调湿、试样制备、织物表面或燃烧速率判定标准。
summary.zht: 中國國內紡織品安全框架主要以GB 18401-2010規範基本化學和物理安全，並以GB 31701-2015規範嬰幼兒及兒童紡織產品。部分具體產品中國標準可能涉及阻燃性能，但符合GB 18401的一般服裝並不會自動按加拿大紡織品易燃性條例測試。中國供應商檢測報告可能採用不同的調濕、試樣製備、織物表面或燃燒速率判定標準。

standards_or_laws: GB 18401-2010 — National General Safety Technical Code for Textile Products (mandatory)
GB 31701-2015 — Safety Technical Code for Textile Products for Infants and Young Children (mandatory, children's items)

gap.en: A common gap is assuming that general China textile safety testing covers Canadian burn-performance rules. Canada requires evaluation against SOR/2016-194 or an applicable product-specific Canadian regulation. Raised-fibre fabrics, costumes, loose-fitting garments, brushed fleece, chenille, pile fabrics, and lightweight synthetics should be screened early. Any flame-retardant treatment also needs chemical and durability review, because passing flammability by treatment does not remove obligations under CCPSA or other chemical restrictions.
gap.zh: 常见差距是误以为中国一般纺织品安全检测已覆盖加拿大燃烧性能规则。加拿大要求按SOR/2016-194或适用的加拿大具体产品条例评估。起绒织物、化装服、宽松服装、拉绒抓绒、雪尼尔、绒面织物和轻薄合成纤维应尽早筛查。任何阻燃整理还需进行化学和耐久性审查，因为通过阻燃处理满足易燃性要求，并不免除CCPSA或其他化学限制义务。
gap.zht: 常見差距是誤以為中國一般紡織品安全檢測已覆蓋加拿大燃燒性能規則。加拿大要求按SOR/2016-194或適用的加拿大具體產品條例評估。起絨織物、化裝服、寬鬆服裝、拉絨抓絨、雪尼爾、絨面織物和輕薄合成纖維應盡早篩查。任何阻燃整理還需進行化學和耐久性審查，因為通過阻燃處理滿足易燃性要求，並不免除CCPSA或其他化學限制義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Canada Consumer Product Safety Act duties and Textile Flammability Regulations SOR/2016-194 are legally binding for covered consumer textile products
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory general textile safety under GB 18401-2010, but no automatic equivalence to Canadian flammability testing

source.publisher: Justice Laws Website / Government of Canada

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Canadian textile flammability compliance is mandatory and separate from fibre labelling. Do not rely on GB 18401 or a generic supplier statement for Canada-bound goods; obtain product-specific evidence against SOR/2016-194 or the applicable Canadian product regulation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加拿大纺织品易燃性合规为强制要求，并且独立于纤维标签。出口加拿大的货品不得仅依赖GB 18401或通用供应商声明；应取得按SOR/2016-194或适用加拿大产品条例评估的产品专属证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加拿大紡織品易燃性合規為強制要求，並且獨立於纖維標籤。出口加拿大的貨品不得僅依賴GB 18401或通用供應商聲明；應取得按SOR/2016-194或適用加拿大產品條例評估的產品專屬證據。
